subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou partake of the sealed wine which hath been unsealed by the Finger of the Self-Subsisting, and receive thy portion thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله از رحیق مختوم که باصبع قیوم گشوده شد بیاشامی و قسمت بری از برای
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
